hero.title: Your Portfolio.
hero.description: Create your online-portfolio with a modular Editor. Content can be structurally build, edited and be displayed as a personal page.

sectionTitle.title: Everything you need for your portfolio.
sectionTitle.description: This Website places its focus on the structural creation, editing and design of your personal portfolio Content.

facts-box-one.title: Modular block-Editor
facts-box-one.description: Create your own portfolio out of modular content blocks.Sections can be added, edited and placed in whatever order you want.

facts-box-two.title: Personal Content
facts-box-two.description: Show Information about you, your projects, abilities and additional content in clear and structural shape.

facts-box-three.title: Easy editing
facts-box-three.description: Content is directly accessible and manageable in the editor.The focus lies on clear and understandable controls.

facts-box-four.title: Publish portfolio
facts-box-four.description: The portfolio is accessible online after editing, so that your own work can be digitally presented.

sectionTitle.title: How the modular block-editor works
sectionTitle.description: Every section of your portfolio is registered as a block and can be edited and adjusted however you want.

fact-one.title: Choose block
fact-one.description: Choose your preferred choice of block, that you want to use in your portfolio.

fact-two.title: Edit Content
fact-two.description: Add text, pictures and other information directly to the chosen section of your portfolio.

fact-three.title: Adjust structure
fact-three.description: Adjust the section accordingly, so that your portfolio is structured clearly and fitting to your content.

fact-four.title: Publish portfolio
fact-four.description: Once your content is finished, you can publish your portfolio online and later update it accordingly.

sectionTitle.title: From the Account to your own Portfolio in three steps
sectionTitle.description: The Sequence is clearly build: register, record your content and publish your portfolio online.

fact-one.title: Register
fact-one.description: Create an account to use your personal area and portfolio-editor.

fact-two.title: Create Portfolio
fact-two.description: Add Content in form of blocks and place your information however you want to present yourself.
fact-two.bp-two: Enter your Content in the editor
fact-two.bp-three: Adjust the order to your preference

fact-three.title: Publish
fact-three.description: As soon as your portfolio is finished you publish it online and later update it accordingly.

sectionTitle.title: Made for humans, who want to show their work digitally.
sectionTitle.description: CreateYourself is suitable for all, who have the desire to present their content structurally and online.

fact-one.subtitle: Apprentices and applicants
fact-one.title: Show your career and your projects clearly
fact-one.description: Put information about you, your skills and your experience in your own portfolio page together.
fact-one.bp-three: Use your portfolio as a digital presentation

fact-two.subtitle: Developers
fact-two.title: Present technical projects on your own page.
fact-two.description: Describe projects, show different technologies and give structural overview about your work.
fact-two.bp-two: Show lists of technologies and skills

fact-three.subtitle: Creative and design oriented people
fact-three.title: Show content with a clear visual structure.
fact-three.description: Use different portfolio-sections to display projects, descriptions and personal information clearly.

public.title: Show online and edit further later.

fact-one.title: Personal portfolio-page
fact-one.description: The goal of the website is to display personal content as your own portfolio-page online.

fact-two.title: Edit and Publish
fact-two.description: Content is prepared in the editor and can then be used for the portfolio-page.

fact-three.title: Update content later
fact-three.description: The portfolio can be updated further, even after it has been published.

fact-four.title: Digital Presentation
fact-four.description: CreateYourself allows you to save and present personal information and your projects online.

cta.title: Ready to create your own Portfolio?
cta.subtitle: Put your projects, skills and information in your own portfolio-page together. Everything at one place, clearly structured and presentable online.
